mapper.select: SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'annotation-statistics'
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'web-xml-analysis'
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'file-store-analysis'
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'persistence-analysis'
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'ejb-jar-analysis'
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'pom-xml-analysis'
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'faces-config-analysis'
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'jsp-file-count'
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'jsf-file-count'
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'jsp-content-analysis'
SELECT * FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'jsf-content-analysis'
mapper.insert: insert into analysis_report (name, create_time, update_time, user_id, source_folder_id, parse_output_id, path) VALUES (#{name}, #{createTime},#{updateTime},#{userId},#{sourceFolderId},#{parseOutputId}, #{path})
mapper.update:
update analysis_report
name = #{name},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
user_id = #{userId},
source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId},
parse_output_id = #{parseOutputId},
path = #{path},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'annotation-statistics'
DELETE FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'web-xml-analysis'
DELETE FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'file-store-analysis'
DELETE FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'persistence-analysis'
DELETE FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'ejb-jar-analysis'
DELETE FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'pom-xml-analysis'
DELETE FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'faces-config-analysis'
DELETE FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'jsp-content-analysis'
DELETE FROM analysis_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId} AND name = 'jsf-content-analysis'
